title: WorldSalad's Sleek Dark UI
description: Changes the ingame UI to a sleek, dark theme for the pleasure of your eyes.
body:
⚙️ WorldSalad's Sleek Dark UI
-
🢂 Changes the Minecraft UI to a handcrafted shiny, dark theme that is easy on the eyes and beautiful.

🢂 Changes all UI elements!

🢂 Available for multiple Minecraft versions

💡 Info & Help
-
🢂 Ask for help and report bugs in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)
